statusBadge.collectionActive: At least one source connection has completed a sync or is currently syncing. Your collection has data and is ready for queries.
statusBadge.collectionError: All source connections have failed their last sync. Check your connections and authentication to resolve sync issues.
statusBadge.collectionNeedsSource: This collection has no authenticated connections, or connections exist but haven't successfully synced yet. Configure a source or wait for the initial sync to complete.
statusBadge.apiKeyActive: This API key is valid and can be used to authenticate requests. It will remain active until its expiration date.
statusBadge.apiKeyExpiring: This API key will expire within 7 days. Create a new key before expiration to avoid service interruption.
statusBadge.apiKeyExpired: This API key has expired and can no longer be used. Delete this key and create a new one to continue using the API.
statusBadge.apiKeyUnknown: Unable to determine the status of this API key. Please verify the expiration date.

welcome.title: Welcome to Nebo
welcome.description: Your first AI employee. Let's get you set up in just a minute.

terms.title: Privacy & Terms
terms.description: Important information about how Nebo handles your data
terms.dataLocalDesc: All conversations, memories, and settings are stored locally on your device in a SQLite database. Nothing is sent to Nebo's servers.
terms.aiProviderDesc: When you chat, your messages are sent to your chosen AI provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google) for processing. Their privacy policies apply to that data.
terms.apiKeysDesc: Your API keys are stored locally in your device's database. They are only used to authenticate with your AI provider.
terms.systemAccessDesc: Nebo can access system features (files, shell, contacts, etc.) but only capabilities you explicitly enable. You control what the employee can do.
terms.noAnalyticsDesc: Nebo does not collect usage analytics, telemetry, or crash reports. Your usage is completely private.
terms.consent: I understand that my conversations are sent to my chosen AI provider for processing, and that I control which system capabilities the employee can access.

settingsPermissions.title: Permissions
settingsPermissions.description: Control what capabilities your employee has access to and how it handles approvals.
settingsPermissions.fullAutonomousDesc: The employee will execute ALL tools without asking for permission — shell commands, file modifications, and network requests.
settingsPermissions.autonomousActiveDesc: All approval prompts are bypassed. Make sure you trust the prompts you're sending.

settingsPermissions.autoShellDesc: Allow executing bash commands without prompting
settingsPermissions.enableDescription: This will allow your employee to execute all tools — including shell commands, file modifications, and network requests — without asking for permission.
settingsPermissions.risk1: The employee may modify or delete files on your system
settingsPermissions.risk2: The employee may execute arbitrary shell commands
settingsPermissions.risk3: The employee may make network requests and access external services
settingsPermissions.risk4: You are solely responsible for any actions taken by the employee
settingsPermissions.disclaimer: By enabling autonomous mode, you acknowledge that Nebo Labs, Inc. shall not be liable for any damages, losses, or consequences arising from the autonomous execution of tools by the employee. You accept full responsibility for all actions taken by the employee while autonomous mode is enabled.
settingsPermissions.acceptRisks: I understand the risks and accept full responsibility

settingsPermissions.fullAccessDesc: The employee will execute all tools without asking for permission.
settingsPermissions.approvedCommandsDesc: Shell command prefixes you chose "Approve Always" for — they run without asking. Dangerous commands are still blocked.
settingsPermissions.approvalDialogDesc: When an employee needs permission, this dialog appears.
settingsPermissions.enableWarning: This will allow your agent to execute all tools — including shell commands, file modifications, and network requests — without asking for permission.
settingsPermissions.fullAccessDisclaimer: By enabling Full Access, you acknowledge that Nebo Labs, Inc. shall not be liable for any damages, losses, or consequences arising from the unsupervised execution of tools by the agent. You accept full responsibility for all actions taken by the agent while Full Access is enabled.

agentSettings.agentActive: This employee is active and running.

agentSettings.configManagedPrefix: This agent's configuration is managed by its
agentSettings.configManagedSuffix: and cannot be edited directly. Duplicate it to create an editable copy.
agentSettings.duplicateDesc: Creates a faithful copy — same persona, skills, workflows, and configuration — with its own name and identity. The copy connects its own accounts.
agentSettings.deleteWarning: This will permanently remove the agent, all threads, runs, and memory. This action cannot be undone.
agentSettings.duplicateNoId: Duplicate did not return a new agent.
agentSettings.personaDesc: The agent's operating instructions — what it does, how it works, what rules it follows.
agentSettings.personaPlaceholder:
You are an AI employee who specializes in...

## Rules
- Always confirm before taking consequential actions
- Be concise but thorough when needed

## Capabilities
- Research and analysis
- Document drafting
- Task automation
agentSettings.soulDesc: Who this agent IS — voice, tone, personality, values, and boundaries. Not what it does, but how it speaks and who it is.
agentSettings.soulPlaceholder:
# Core Truths
- Be genuinely helpful, not performatively helpful
- Have opinions and share them when relevant
- Be resourceful before asking for help
- Earn trust through competence

# Vibe
- Conversational and warm, not corporate
- Direct and honest — skip filler words
- Concise when needed, thorough when it matters

# Boundaries
- Private things stay private. Period.
- When in doubt, ask before acting externally
- Never send half-baked replies

# Personality
- Curious and engaged
- Patient with complex problems
- Lighthearted when appropriate
- Not a sycophant — be genuine
agentSettings.rulesDesc: Behavior constraints and guardrails — what this agent must or must not do.
agentSettings.rulesPlaceholder:
# Rules
- Always confirm before taking destructive actions
- Never send emails without explicit approval
- Keep responses concise unless asked for detail
- Escalate to owner if uncertain about a request

# Boundaries
- Do not access files outside the project directory
- Do not make purchases or financial commitments
- Do not share sensitive information externally
agentSettings.noWorkflows: No workflows configured. Create one or install from the Marketplace.
agentSettings.skillsAssignedTo: Skills assigned to {name}. Add more from the Marketplace.
agentSettings.exposeToLoopDesc: When off, this agent won't appear in your loop.

agentSettings.accountsDesc: Connect multiple accounts to {name} for plugins that support it — for example several Gmail inboxes. Each account signs in separately and {name} can use any of them.

giveNebo.title: Give Nebo
giveNebo.giveBonus: Give a friend a bonus 1M tokens
giveNebo.bonusDesc: They get 3M tokens on signup plus a bonus 1M from you — 4M total to start. You get 3M when they try it.
giveNebo.connectPrompt: Connect your NeboAI account to get your gift link.
giveNebo.step1Desc: Send your personal link to someone you want to have Nebo.
giveNebo.step2Desc: Everyone gets 3M on signup. Your gift adds a bonus 1M — so they start with 4 million tokens.
giveNebo.step3Desc: Once they try Nebo, you receive 3 million tokens as a thank you.
giveNebo.expiry: The more people you bring along, the more tokens you earn. Each milestone unlocks additional perks on your NeboAI profile. All bonus tokens expire 90 days after they're granted.

memoryManager.title: Memory Banks
memoryManager.subtitle: This employee's stored knowledge — private to it, plus your shared preferences.
memoryManager.tacitBlurb: Lasting facts about you and how this employee should work — preferences, role, and the people and projects that keep coming up.
memoryManager.dailyBlurb: Day-to-day notes tied to a specific date — what happened and what’s coming up. These age out over time.
memoryManager.entityBlurb: What this employee knows about the specific people, companies, and things it deals with.
memoryManager.howItWorksIntro: This employee remembers across conversations in three layers — and only its own:

chat.title: This is where we talk
chat.bodyPersonal: Ask me anything, or just tell me what to do — I take it from there.
chat.bodyBusiness: Ask me anything, or just tell me what to do — I take it from there.

agents.title: Your employees live here
agents.bodyPersonal: I'm Nebo. You can add specialists anytime — each is great at a different job.
agents.bodyBusiness: I'm Nebo. Add specialists anytime — a Chief of Staff, a researcher, and more.

work.title: Your work shows up here
work.bodyPersonal: Notes, lists, and documents I make for you open in this panel.
work.bodyBusiness: Documents, spreadsheets, and decks I make for you open in this panel.

schedule.title: Put things on autopilot
schedule.bodyPersonal: Set reminders and routines — appointments, bills, a morning rundown.
schedule.bodyBusiness: Automate the recurring work — morning briefings, follow-ups, reports.

marketplace.title: Add new abilities
marketplace.bodyPersonal: Browse skills and tools — document editing, design, and more.
marketplace.bodyBusiness: Browse skills and tools — document editing, design, a Chief of Staff, and more.

search.title: Jump anywhere fast
search.bodyPersonal: Press ⌘K to search or run any command in a flash.
search.bodyBusiness: Press ⌘K to search or run any command in a flash.

onboardingTour.accountQuestion: First — who am I mostly here to help?
onboardingTour.welcomeBody: I live on your computer and help you organize and automate {noun}. Let me give you a quick tour so you know where everything is.
onboardingTour.finaleTitle: That's the lay of the land.
onboardingTour.finaleBody: Want me to set up your core tools now? I'll add document editing (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, PDF), design, and publishing — so you can start making real things right away.

pricing.heading: Plans that grow with you

pricing.doubleUpDesc: Same workforce. Twice as much of it.

onboardingPage.welcomeDescription: Your AI workforce, running locally on your machine. Let's get you set up in under a minute.
onboardingPage.termsBody: Nebo runs AI agents on your machine. Agents can read files, execute commands, and access the web based on the permissions you grant. By continuing, you agree to the
onboardingPage.languageDesc: You can change this later in Settings.
onboardingPage.connectDesc: Connect your NeboAI account to access the marketplace, billing, and the Janus AI gateway.
onboardingPage.browserOpened: A browser window has been opened. Complete the sign-in there, then return here.
onboardingPage.connectionTimedOut: Connection timed out. Please try again.
onboardingPage.oauthExpired: OAuth session expired. Please try again.
onboardingPage.permissionsDesc: Choose what your employees can access. You can change these later in Settings.
onboardingPage.fullAccessDesc: The employee will execute all tools without asking for permission.
onboardingPage.previewApproval: Preview what agents see when asking for permission
onboardingPage.enableFullAccessDesc: This will allow your agent to execute all tools — including shell commands, file modifications, and network requests — without asking for permission.
onboardingPage.fullAccessDisclaimer: By enabling Full Access, you acknowledge that Nebo Labs, Inc. shall not be liable for any damages, losses, or consequences arising from the unsupervised execution of tools by the agent. You accept full responsibility for all actions taken by the agent while Full Access is enabled.
onboardingPage.doneDesc: Nebo is ready. Your workforce is standing by.

settingsEvents.title: System Events
settingsEvents.description: Live view of agent, workflow, tool, and watcher event sources.

settingsBrowser.title: Browser
settingsBrowser.description: How Nebo browses the web — the Chrome/Brave extension and the built-in fallback browser.
settingsBrowser.extensionConnected: Connected — Nebo can drive your logged-in Chrome or Brave browser.
settingsBrowser.builtInAvailable: Available — Nebo falls back to its bundled browser when the extension isn't connected.
settingsBrowser.builtInMissing: Not available. Reinstall Nebo to restore the bundled browser.

settingsMcp.title: MCP Servers
settingsMcp.description: Manage Model Context Protocol server connections.
settingsMcp.browseConnectorsDesc: Discover pre-configured MCP servers in the marketplace.
settingsMcp.apiKeyModalDesc: This server authenticates with a static API key or bearer token. It's stored encrypted on this device.
settingsMcp.authQuestion: How does this server authenticate requests?
settingsMcp.serverUrlHint: The MCP server's endpoint URL (Streamable HTTP)
settingsMcp.oauthNote: This server uses OAuth. You'll be redirected to authorize after adding.
settingsMcp.noneNote: No authentication required. The server will be connected directly.
settingsMcp.toolPermissionsDesc: Choose how each tool from this server can run. New tools default to Needs approval.
settingsMcp.noToolsSynced: No tools synced yet — connect the server or refresh the tools list.

settingsUpdates.description: Available updates for your installed plugins, employees, skills, MCP connectors, and apps. You approve each update; turn on auto-update per item to apply silently.
